MountCdsDisk.action: Action to perform on the disk; current valid value: attach
MountCdsDisk.instanceId: ID of the virtual machine instance to attach the disk to
MountCdsDisk.deleteWithInstance: Whether to delete the disk when the instance is deleted; default is false; only supported for postpaid data disks
MountCdsDisk.deleteAutoSnapshot: Whether to delete automatic snapshots when the disk is deleted; default is false; supported for all disk types
